preamble: The shift from [ʌ] to the diphthong [ʉɪ] or [ɥi] involves rounding and fronting processes. While phonetically plausible in complex vowel chain shifts, documented examples of this specific transition from [ʌ] are sparse in the linguistic literature.

examples.note: Theoretical pathway of fronting, rounding, and diphthongization; not documented in established sound change literature.
